output.formatted:
Ocean's Eleven

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?movie WHERE {
  ?movie wdt:P57 wd:Q44191 ; wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?releaseDate) , "2001-"))
}
```

Got no rows and 1 columns
